title: Novel HCFC1 variants identified in patients with ASD/ADHD and previously unreported structural brain malformations reveal the potential for phenotypic expansion.
abstract: Pathogenic variants in HCFC1 (transcriptional cofactor) cause cblX syndrome, intellectual disability, or partial focal epilepsy. Report of 2 novel HCFC1 variants including one non-coding variant in patients with ASD/ADHD and structural brain malformations. Expands HCFC1 phenotype.
